label: false-dup
a: All service logs use structured JSON format with standardized fields: timestamp, level, service, trace_id, user_id, message.
b: Log retention policy: operational logs (application and access logs) retained 90 days then deleted. Transaction records (orders, payments, audit trail) retained 2 years for compliance.
reviewer_notes: Different aspects of logging: A is the log format; B is the retention schedule. Complementary.
